creator: Russell Brandom
title: (No AI) How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
dc:creator: Russell Brandom
content: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.
contentSnippet: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.
contentSnippet: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

title: (No AI) These new iOS 27 renders hint at Siri’s big redesign
author: Stevie Bonifield
content:
![Photo of a hand holding iPhone with new Siri and ChatGPT.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25698444/DSC08567_processed_2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Apple's [long-awaited Siri overhaul](https://www.theverge.com/news/860521/apple-siri-google-gemini-ai-personalization), expected to arrive in iOS 27, might look a lot like ChatGPT with a splash of Liquid Glass. Renders from [_Bloomberg_](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/features/2026-05-28/apple-ios-27-photos-screenshots-revamped-siri-pro-camera-app-new-ai-features) offer a preview of iOS 27, including the new app and chat interface for Siri. The renders are "based on information viewed by _Bloomberg_ and people with knowledge of \[Apple's\] plans," and could differ from Apple's final designs, which _Bloomberg_'s Mark Gurman says Apple will reveal at WWDC in June.

![Renders from Bloomberg showing Siri in the Dynamic Island in iOS 27](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/bloomberg-ios-27-renders-dynamic-island.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100 "Renders from Bloomberg showing Siri in the Dynamic Island in iOS 27")

The images show a new pill-shaped Siri chat bubble popping out of the Dynamic Island with a drop-down menu containing options for Ask, Siri, and ChatGPT. According to Gurman, you'll be able to open t …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/938915/ios-27-siri-renders-bloomberg)
contentSnippet:
Apple's long-awaited Siri overhaul, expected to arrive in iOS 27, might look a lot like ChatGPT with a splash of Liquid Glass. Renders from Bloomberg offer a preview of iOS 27, including the new app and chat interface for Siri. The renders are "based on information viewed by Bloomberg and people with knowledge of [Apple's] plans," and could differ from Apple's final designs, which Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says Apple will reveal at WWDC in June. 
The images show a new pill-shaped Siri chat bubble popping out of the Dynamic Island with a drop-down menu containing options for Ask, Siri, and ChatGPT. According to Gurman, you'll be able to open t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
author: Emma Roth
content:
![An illustration of the CNN logo](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/STK_Cnn_K_Radtke_2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, [as reported earlier by CNN](https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/28/media/cnn-sues-perplexity-ai-copyright). The lawsuit, [filed in a New York court on Thursday](https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/28169775-cnn-v-perplexity/), also alleges that Perplexity provides users with information locked behind CNN's subscription.

Perplexity, which offers an AI "answer" engine along with the AI browser Comet, is accused of ignoring CNN's efforts "to recognize or block Perplexity's unidentified crawlers" from scraping its content. "Human beings report, research, write, edit, and create the content that Perplexity takes without permission or compensation," the lawsuit claims.

I …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/938893/cnn-perplexity-ai-copyright-lawsuit)

Perplexity, which offers an AI "answer" engine along with the AI browser Comet, is accused of ignoring CNN's efforts "to recognize or block Perplexity's unidentified crawlers" from scraping its content. "Human beings report, research, write, edit, and create the content that Perplexity takes without permission or compensation," the lawsuit claims.
I …
Read the full story at The Verge.
